title: Weekend weather forecast
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest weather update from South African Weather Service (SAWS), there is a warning for possible damaging waves leading to difficulty in navigation at sea in the Cape Town area (between Cape Agulhas and Cape Point from Saturday afternoon, while spreading to Saldanha Bay by late evening.)


> There are no other weather advisories for the weekend.


You can expect fine and warm conditions, but cool along the coast.

- Sunrise: 07:03
- Sunset 18:00


> Here is the weekend temperature forecast:


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
